hero.description: Capturing the raw beauty of the world, one journey at a time.

about.title: Every journey tells a story
about.text: I travel slowly, paying attention to light. Each photograph is an observation from my journey.

about.title: Nico Garay
about.text1: I travel to observe light and place. My camera teaches me how to see.
about.text2: Each photograph is what I've observed. Available in high resolution for print.
